description: Introduce a new ai-council/ subfolder convention parallel to research/ (deep-research) and review/ (deep-review) for capturing multi-ai-council deliberation rounds, per-seat outputs, critiques, and the final synthesized plan. Lightweight: no dedicated skill folder. All council logic stays in the @multi-ai-council agent body plus optional shared references under system-spec-kit. Adds iteration support (resume from state.jsonl), validator awareness, and a documented invocation contract.
